steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure around the blank
steps.content: After that comes a prepositional phrase (through community involvement and scientific study) immediately before the main verb of the relative clause (aim).

steps.title: Apply the punctuation rule for introductory phrases
steps.content: The comma after that correctly separates the relative pronoun from an introductory prepositional phrase within the relative clause. The em dash, semicolon, and colon do not properly punctuate this structure. That matches choice D — D is correct.
